top_tweets.text:
Last week @sebgoddijn shared Glass, Ramp's internal AI productivity tool, with the world. Nearly a million views later, everyone's asking the same thing: how did you actually build this?

Read the full story here:
https://t.co/iR15nRiyNn

The short of it: we built an app that https://t.co/qJFHyCCZLs
top_tweets.author: buchan_sm
top_tweets.name: Shane Buchan
top_tweets.summary_zh: Ramp 分享了他們內部 AI 生產力工具 Glass 的完整開發故事，說明如何建構一個實際運作的企業級 AI 應用，獲得近百萬瀏覽。

top_tweets.text:
This is really accurate. 

As much as we all want to drink the vibe coding kool-aid, the reality is that 90%+ of all code in a company is maintaining and migrating existing stuff that is complicated and messy. You can definitely vibe code the remaining 10% but unless there is a
top_tweets.author: chamath
top_tweets.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 回應「週末就能 vibe code 出來」的論點，指出現實中 90% 以上的程式碼工作是維護與遷移既有系統，這些複雜且混亂的部分無法靠 vibe coding 解決。

context.quoted_text:
Every time I see a tweet saying “I can vibe code this in a weekend” - I think of the slack notification system..

It takes time, persistence and effort to get the details right. 

Sure, a lot of simple workflows will get vibe coded away. And maybe you can put this in Claude Code and get the code right in one shot. 

But quality, depth and great systems will still have value and take time. You can’t vibe code lessons. 

Now and forever.

top_tweets.text:
New course: Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents, built in partnership with @jetbrains, and taught by @paulweveritt.

Vibe coding is fast, but often produces code that doesn't match what you asked for. This short course teaches you spec-driven development: write a detailed https://t.co/M9zaNg2aTb
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: Andrew Ng 與 JetBrains 合作推出新課程，教授「規格驅動開發」：透過撰寫詳細規格來引導 coding agent，避免 vibe coding 產出不符需求的程式碼。

tool calling, multi-step workflows, planning, reflection — the foundations behind every automation system that actually works

most people learn this by copying Make and https://t.co/0oHGDCUBk0

top_tweets.text:
Many people will be surprised to know that there’s actually a very good correlation how good you are at leetcode style problems (not rot learning but new problems) and how do you perform at your job.

Most AI companies still do leetcode style interviews without providing AI tool
top_tweets.author: asmah2107
top_tweets.name: Ashutosh Maheshwari
top_tweets.summary_zh: 指出 leetcode 風格問題的解題能力與實際工作表現有良好相關性，且多數 AI 公司面試仍採用此方式但不提供 AI 工具。討論中有許多對此觀點的正反意見。

top_tweets.text: Looks like AI is not the magical tool that CEOs make it out to be. https://t.co/nX0IMxXdYP
top_tweets.author: futurism
top_tweets.name: Futurism
top_tweets.summary_zh: 文章指出 AI 並非 CEO 宣稱的神奇工具，暗示實際應用效果與期待有落差。

top_tweets.author: mark_k
top_tweets.name: Mark Kretschmann
top_tweets.summary_zh: xAI 即將推出 Grok Build（包含 web app 與 terminal UI）與新的 coding 模型，與 Claude Code 競爭。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Splitt
top_products.author: Zack P
top_products.tagline: Track your workout from your lock screen and Dynamic Island
top_products.summary_zh: 可從 iPhone 鎖定畫面與 Dynamic Island 直接追蹤運動訓練數據的健身記錄工具，適合需要快速記錄的健身愛好者。

top_products.title: 3PL Hub
top_products.author: Ryan Bennett
top_products.summary_zh: 協助電商賣家尋找與比較第三方物流（3PL）履行服務夥伴的搜尋平台。

top_products.title: OpenAI Agents SDK
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: Build production agents with harness and sandbox
top_products.summary_zh: 提供 harness 與 sandbox 環境的開發套件，用於建構可投入生產環境的 AI agents。

top_products.title: Resend CLI 2.0
top_products.author: fmerian
top_products.tagline: Built for humans, AI agents, and CI/CD pipelines
top_products.summary_zh: 支援人類開發者、AI agents 與 CI/CD 流程使用的命令列介面工具，用於管理 Resend 電子郵件服務。

top_products.title: ClawTab
top_products.author: Tõnis Tiganik
top_products.tagline: Desktop app to manage 20+ AI coding agents at once
top_products.summary_zh: 桌面應用程式，可同時管理與切換超過 20 個 AI 程式碼生成助理，適合需要整合多種 coding agents 的開發者。

top_products.title: Subagents in Gemini CLI
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Gemini CLI now runs specialist subagents in your terminal
top_products.summary_zh: Gemini CLI 現支援在終端機內執行專業子代理（subagents），強化命令列環境中的 AI 協作能力。
